## Proposal PR

Proposal file: `proposals/<PR_NUMBER>-<short-slug>.md`

### Checklist

- [ ] Proposal follows the [format](README.md#how-to-submit-a-proposal) (YAML frontmatter, correct filename)
- [ ] Includes Summary, Problem, Proposed approach, Impact, Scope, References, and Technical design sections
- [ ] Alternatives considered are documented
- [ ] Breaking changes are listed explicitly
- [ ] Technical design details are in the Technical design section, not in the proposal body
- [ ] References link to relevant issues/discussions
- [ ] CI checks are passing ([pre-commit.ci](https://results.pre-commit.ci) fixes markdown issues automatically)

### Reviewers

<!-- Tag maintainers of the affected repos. -->
